query: When was Pokémon Gold and Silver released?
answer: Pokémon Gold and Silver were released in 1999 for the Game Boy Color.

query: Which one was the first 3D platformer Mario game?
answer: The first 3D platformer Mario game is **Super Mario 64**, which was released in 1996 for the Nintendo 64. This game is significant as it set new standards for the genre, featuring Mario's quest to rescue Princess Peach in a fully realized 3D environment.

query: Was Mortal Kombat X released for PlayStation 5?
answer:
**Mortal Kombat X** is playable on the PlayStation 5, but it was not specifically released for that platform. Instead, it is a PlayStation 4 game that can be played on the PS5 through backward compatibility. However, some features available on the PS4 version may be absent when played on the PS5. 

For more details, you can check the official PlayStation page [here](https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/mortal-kombat-x_msm_moved/).

query: Which one was the first 3D platformer Mario game?
answer:
The first 3D platformer Mario game is **Super Mario 64**, which was released in 1996 for the Nintendo 64. This game is significant as it set new standards for the genre, featuring Mario's quest to rescue Princess Peach in a fully realized 3D environment. 

While there were earlier attempts at 3D platforming, **Super Mario 64** is often credited with popularizing the genre and demonstrating how 3D gameplay could work effectively. 

For more detailed discussions about its impact and comparisons with other games, you can check out the following resources:
- [Mario 64 wasn't the first true 3D platformer...Sony did it first - VGChartz](https://gamrconnect.vgchartz.com/thread/167485/mario-64-wasnt-the-first-true-3d-platformersony-did-it-first/2/)
- [The 3D Platformer: How 1996 Witnessed the Birth of a Genre](https://retrovolve.com/the-3d-platformer-how-1996-witnessed-the-birth-of-a-genre/)
